/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_basic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_redirection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_background.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_cd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_pipes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_history.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_env_vars.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_glob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_integration.dir/tests/test_operators.cpp.o -o test_integration  lib/libgtest.a
